titleStmt.title: SII 9.697: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 697. (A.R. No. 274 of 1918.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN A FIELD NEAR THE TANK-BUND AT ARASIKERE, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1583, Plava, Mārgaśira, śu. 5, Sthiravāra, corresponding to A.D. 1661 November 16, Saturday. It states that Bāguḷi-Basavapanāyaka-Ayya, son (?) of Mahārājādhirāja Rāmadēvarāya, made a grant of land to Basavaya, son of Giremallaṇa and grandson of Murigeya-Sāntarāvuta of Arasikere as Rāvutta-vṛitti.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgasirastuṁbiceṁdracē
maracāravē trayilōkyanagarāraṁbhamu
lastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē . śrī svasti śrīja
yabudayasālivāhanasaka 1583
plavasaṁvatsarada margisira śu 5 stiravā
radalu śrīmanmahārājādhirāja paramēśvara
śrīvīrapratāpa śrīrāmadēvarāyara komararu
baguḷe basavapanāykaAyyanavaru Arasikere
murigeyasāṁtarautana maga giremallaṁ
ṇana maga basavayage rāutavritige koṭa Arasarama
rada paṭege ga 11 yidake nāu liṁgamudre
stāpita sūryaceṁdrādigaḷuḷa pariyaṁta
ra nāu hāki koṭṭaṁtā būmige tapida
vara bāyali kata tuṁṇe kalupu Ava taṁ
na tāyige tapidaha dēvalōka marttelō
kake horagu . svada(ṁ)ttaṁ dviguṇaṁ
puṇyaṁ paradatanupāḷaṇaṁ para
datapahārēṇa svadattaṁ nisphalaṁ bhavē
tu . śrī
Digital edition of SII 9.697 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
